discardChangesDialog.title: Отхвърли промените?
discardChangesDialog.description: Your unsaved Оформление changes will be reverted to the last saved state. This cannot be undone.

postDescriptionDisplay.title: Post description display
postDescriptionDisplay.description: Collapse post descriptions by default. When enabled, descriptions show a "Read more" link instead of the full text.

column.empty: No callouts in this column yet.

dialog.errorGeneric: Фазата не може да бъде създадена. Опитай отново.

pageHeader.title: Общност
pageHeader.subtitle: Manage members, organizations, and virtual contributors in this space.

organizations.title: Член Организации

organizations.description: Всичкиow members from specific organizations to join automatically.
organizations.hint: Users from these organizations can join without admin approval.

addDialog.description: Pick an organization whose members can join this space without approval.

virtualContributors.title: Виртуални сътрудници
virtualContributors.name: Име
virtualContributors.description: Manage AI agents and bots participating in this space.

addDialog.title: Добави Virtual Contributor
addDialog.description: Pick a virtual contributor from this account to add to the space.
addDialog.empty: No virtual contributors available on this account.

addExternalDialog.title: Покани External Virtual Contributor
addExternalDialog.description: Покани a virtual contributor from the Alkemio library. The owner will have to accept the invitation.
addExternalDialog.empty: No library virtual contributors match your search.

applicationForm.title: Формуляр за кандидатстване
applicationForm.description: Customize the questions users must answer when applying to join this space.

guidelines.hint: Displayed to new members upon joining.

user.description: Премахни {{name}} from this space? They will lose access immediately.

applicationReject.description: Reject {{name}}'s application to join this space?

invite.title: Покани Членs
invite.description: Покани an existing Alkemio member by picking from the list, or invite someone new by email.

pageHeader.title: Подпространства
pageHeader.subtitle: Редактирай the Подпространства in this Space. Configure default templates and view all existing subspaces.

defaultTemplate.title: Default Subspace Template
defaultTemplate.description: Choose the default settings that will apply when creating a new Subspace within this Space.

dialog.title: Change Default Subspace Template
dialog.intro: Customize the default Template for newly created Подпространства.
dialog.description: Below you can choose between the Шаблони collected in the Space Template Library. If you're looking to create new Шаблони or explore additional Шаблони, <library>click here</library> to access this library.

subspaces.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

profile.help: This description will be visible to anyone browsing templates. It is not part of the template content itself.

fields.tagsPlaceholder: Добави a tag and press Enter

urlLoader.description: Paste the URL of a space or subspace to use its collaboration content as the basis of this template.

errors.noRights: You need admin rights on the space you want to copy as a template.

errors.nameTooShort: Template name must be at least 3 characters

pageHeader.title: Настройки
pageHeader.subtitle: Configure your space's visibility, membership policies, and allowed member actions.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.description: Control who can see and access this space
visibility.publicDescription: This Space and its contents are visible to everyone on the platform. Users can only contribute if they are a member.
visibility.privateDescription: This Space is visible to everyone on the platform, but the content is only visible to members.
visibility.hint: Consider your space's purpose and audience when choosing visibility.

membership.title: Членship
membership.description: Choose how users join your space
membership.openDescription: Всички Space members can directly join, without you having to review their applications.
membership.openHint: Best for public, open collaboration spaces
membership.applicationDescription: If people want to become a member, they have to fill in the application form. You receive their applications (see community tab here) and you can accept them or reject them.
membership.applicationHint: Best for curated spaces with specific requirements
membership.invitationDescription: Users can only become a member after you've invited them. There is no 'apply' or 'join' button for others to click.
membership.invitationHint: Best for private, restricted collaboration teams
membership.hostOrgTrust: Всичкиow members of {{host}} to join this Space without an application.

applicationForm.title: Формуляр за кандидатстване
applicationForm.description: This section allows you to modify the questions for users applying to the Space. Please note that these questions will only be shown when the membership options (in the block above) are set to "Applications required".

deleteConfirm.title: Изтрий question
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to remove this question?

allowedActions.title: Всичкиowed Действия
allowedActions.description: Choose which actions members can perform in this space
allowedActions.inheritMembershipRightsDescription: Членовете на родителското пространство автоматично получават достъп до това подпространство.
